deliverables.planText: Add `"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/analysis"` import. In `Health()`: add a `counted` variable initialized to 0; at top of the records loop, guard with `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }`; increment `counted` after guard; replace `len(records)` denominator with `counted` for `PassRate` and `AverageScore` calculations; add a check for `counted == 0` to avoid division by zero, returning appropriate N/A values if no supported records.
nonGoals: Do not modify scorer.go, pipeline.go, or domain types
Do not change N/A rendering logic
Do not add new report output formats
Do not modify other report files
deliverables.objective: Guard the records loop in internal/report/health.go and use a counted denominator for pass rate and average score, adding the analysis import.

deliverables.planText: Add `"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/analysis"` import. In `computeDimensionAverages()`: at top of the records loop, add `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }` before summing dimensions and incrementing counts. In `computeLanguageBreakdowns()`: at top of its records loop, add the same guard before per-language accumulation.
nonGoals: Do not modify scorer.go, pipeline.go, or domain types
Do not change N/A rendering logic
Do not add new report output formats
Do not introduce counted denominator (per-dimension/language counts already handle it)

deliverables.planText: Add `"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/analysis"` import. In `buildLanguageDetail()`: at top of the records loop, add `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }` before computing per-language sums and counts.
nonGoals: Do not modify scorer.go, pipeline.go, or domain types

Do not add new report output formats

deliverables.objective: Guard the buildLanguageDetail loop in internal/report/full.go to skip unsupported records, adding the analysis import.

deliverables.planText: In `GenerateCard()`: add a `counted` variable initialized to 0; at top of the records loop, add `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }`; increment `counted` after guard; replace `len(records)` denominator with `counted` for `TotalUnits`, `PassRate`, and `OverallScore` calculations; handle `counted == 0` edge case to avoid division by zero, ensuring overall score becomes N/A when no supported records exist.
nonGoals: Do not modify scorer.go, pipeline.go, or domain types

ticketTitle: Update report consumers to skip Unsupported records in aggregate calculations
